suppress.notes: CVE-2026-54515 affects jackson-databind 2.21.x and 2.22.0 (managed by Spring Boot 3.5.15 BOM). No patched release is available yet. Suppress until a fixed version is published.
CVE-2026-53914 affects kotlin-stdlib 2.4.0 (pinned to avoid CVE-2020-29582 on older versions). No patched release is available yet. Suppress until a fixed version is published.
